Bash(python3 -c "
# 簡易的にロジックをテストするため、阪急阪神のXBRLから取得したroleリストと
# コード内のmajor_headingsを確認

major_headings = [
    ''ConsolidatedBalanceSheetHeading'', ''ConsolidatedStatementOfIncomeHeading'', 
    ''ConsolidatedStatementOfCashFlowsHeading'', ''ConsolidatedStatementOfChangesInEquityHeading'',
    ''BalanceSheetHeading'', ''StatementOfIncomeHeading'', ''StatementOfChangesInEquityHeading'',
    ''ConsolidatedStatementOfFinancialPositionIFRSHeading'', ''ConsolidatedStatementOfProfitOrLossIFRSHeading'',
    ''ConsolidatedStatementOfCashFlowsIFRSHeading'', ''ConsolidatedStatementOfChangesInEquityIFRSHeading'',
    ''ConsolidatedStatementOfFinancialPositionHeading'', 
    ''ConsolidatedStatementOfProfitOrLossHeading'',
    ''ConsolidatedStatementOfComprehensiveIncomeIFRSHeading'',
    ''SummaryOfBusinessResultsHeading'', ''BusinessResultsOfGroupHeading'', ''BusinessResultsOfReportingCompanyHeading''
]

# 阪急阪神で見つかったHeading
actual_headings = [
    ''jppfs_cor_ConsolidatedBalanceSheetHeading'',
    ''jppfs_cor_ConsolidatedStatementOfIncomeHeading'',
    ''jppfs_cor_ConsolidatedStatementOfComprehensiveIncomeHeading'',
    ''jppfs_cor_ConsolidatedStatementOfCashFlowsHeading''
]

print(''=== Major headings in code ==='')
for h in major_headings:
    print(f''  {h}'')

print(''\n=== Actual headings in 阪急阪神 XBRL ==='')
for h in actual_headings:
    matched = False
    for mh in major_headings:
        if h.endswith(mh):
            print(f''  {h} -> MATCHES {mh}'')
            matched = True
            break
    if not matched:
        print(f''  {h} -> NO MATCH'')

# 問題：ConsolidatedStatementOfComprehensiveIncomeHeading がmajor_headingsに含まれていない
print(''\n包括利益計算書のHeadingはリストに含まれている:'', ''ConsolidatedStatementOfComprehensiveIncomeHeading'' in major_headings)
")

print(''=== シート一覧 ==='')

Bash(python3 -c "
import openpyxl

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(''XBRL_横展開_阪急阪神ホールディングス.xlsx'')

# 連結貸借対照表の末尾15行を確認
ws_bs = wb[''連結貸借対照表(日本基準)'']
print(''=== 連結貸借対照表(日本基準) 末尾15行 ==='')
start_row = max(1, ws_bs.max_row - 14)
for row in range(start_row, ws_bs.max_row + 1):
    account = ws_bs.cell(row, 1).value
    element = ws_bs.cell(row, 2).value
    if account:
        print(f''{row:3d}. {account}\t{element}'')

print(''\n=== 連結損益計算書(日本基準) 末尾15行 ==='')
ws_pl = wb[''連結損益計算書(日本基準)'']
start_row = max(1, ws_pl.max_row - 14)
for row in range(start_row, ws_pl.max_row + 1):
    account = ws_pl.cell(row, 1).value
    element = ws_pl.cell(row, 2).value
    if account:
        print(f''{row:3d}. {account}\t{element}'')
")

Bash(python3 -c "
import openpyxl

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook(''XBRL_横展開_阪急阪神ホールディングス.xlsx'')

# 連結貸借対照表の末尾20行を確認
ws_bs = wb[''連結貸借対照表(日本基準)'']
print(''=== 連結貸借対照表(日本基準) 末尾20行 ==='')
print(f''総行数: {ws_bs.max_row}'')
start_row = max(1, ws_bs.max_row - 19)
for row in range(start_row, ws_bs.max_row + 1):
    account = ws_bs.cell(row, 1).value
    element = ws_bs.cell(row, 2).value
    if account:
        print(f''{row:3d}. {account[:60]}\t{element}'')

print(''\n=== 連結損益計算書(日本基準) 末尾20行 ==='')
ws_pl = wb[''連結損益計算書(日本基準)'']
print(f''総行数: {ws_pl.max_row}'')
start_row = max(1, ws_pl.max_row - 19)
for row in range(start_row, ws_pl.max_row + 1):
    account = ws_pl.cell(row, 1).value
    element = ws_pl.cell(row, 2).value
    if account:
        print(f''{row:3d}. {account[:60]}\t{element}'')
")
